name: Aptiv plc
lede: Aptiv runs five centers across three Indian cities. Pune, Chennai and Bengaluru, covering engineering & design and IT, built over 26 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Aptiv office in India. We map five, across three cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Aptiv plc GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Aptiv runs 5 verified centers across 3 Indian cities (Pune, Chennai, Bengaluru), covering engineering & design and IT. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

leaders.departments: Finance, IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement

about.description: Aptiv's India footprint covers Pune, Chennai and Bengaluru, spanning engineering & design and IT. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D, Finance & Accounting and HR for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 23 decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many centers does Aptiv operate in India?
faq.a: Aptiv operates 5 active centers in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Aptiv have centers in?
faq.a: Aptiv's India footprint includes Pune and 2 additional cities.

faq.q: What types of centers does Aptiv run in India?
faq.a: Aptiv runs engineering & design and 1 additional center types centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Aptiv's India centers?
faq.a: Aggregate and center-level headcount for Aptiv's India operations is available in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Aptiv's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks leaders at Aptiv's India centers, across Finance and other leadership functions. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
